seoTitle: Wang Wauk vs Wanganui — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wang Wauk and Wanganui. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wang Wauk vs Wanganui: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wang Wauk and Wanganui.
heading: Wang Wauk vs Wanganui — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wang Wauk, New South Wales and Wanganui, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wanganui has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Wang Wauk (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wang Wauk or Wanganui safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wang Wauk has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Wanganui scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wang Wauk scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Wanganui scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wang Wauk or Wanganui?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wanganui has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
